name: Shot Vasco
description:
__Height:__ 573 cm (18'10")
__Affiliations:__ Blackbeard Pirates

Vasco Shot is a large member of the Blackbeard Pirates. Known as "Mighty Drinker" Vasco Shot (大酒のバスコ・ショット, Oozake no Basuko Shotto), he was one of the legendary criminals who was given a life sentence in Level 6 of Impel Down, before being freed by Blackbeard and joining him.
